posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
The biggest monday.com event of the year is just around the corner, and we don’t want you to miss out!

This is your last chance to join hundreds of monday.com users for:

  • Game-changing insights and strategies
  • Face-to-face networking with fellow community members
  • Hands-on workshops you won’t find anywhere else
  • The latest monday.com innovations and announcements

Upcoming dates:
New York - September 17-18, 2025
London - October 22-23, 2025
Sydney - November 6, 2025

Register Now - Limited spots remaining!

See you soon,
The monday.com Team
